name: dcterms-creator-subproperty-of-contributor
query: PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> ASK WHERE { dcterms:creator <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#subPropertyOf> dcterms:contributor }

name: dcterms-creator-equivalent-foaf-maker
query: PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/> ASK WHERE { dcterms:creator <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#equivalentProperty> foaf:maker }
